leads.location: Sydney HQ; 29-40+ clinics across NSW, VIC, QLD
leads.size_hint: 40+ clinics claimed on site, 29 shown in clinic finder; franchising since 2004
leads.why_pain: Public reviews describe repeated appointment cancellations, head office phone calls going unanswered, and in-clinic staff 'expected to answer calls and walk ins' with 'never enough staff' - classic missed-call / rebooking leakage at franchise scale.
leads.evidence: https://www.trustpilot.com/review/resultslaserclinic.com.au (reviews citing cancelled appointments, unreachable head office, understaffed phones); locations: https://resultslaserclinic.com.au/clinic-locations/
leads.decision_maker_role: Franchisor head office - Managing Director / Head of Operations or Marketing
leads.contact_channel: Contact form at https://resultslaserclinic.com.au/contact-us/; head office phone listed on site
leads.outreach_angle: AI phone/booking overflow layer for all franchise clinics: answer every missed call, handle reschedules and cancellations automatically, protect prepaid-package revenue and Trustpilot rating.
leads.personalization: Reference their own Trustpilot reviews where customers say they called head office 'numerous times' after cancellations - quantify what a 24/7 AI rebooking line recovers per clinic per month.

leads.location: Sunshine Coast QLD (8 practices: Caloundra, Kawana, Maroochydore, Bli Bli, Baringa, Sippy Downs, Tewantin, Beerwah) plus Brisbane, Adelaide, Melbourne
leads.size_hint: ~12 practices across 4 regions; self-described 'Australia's most awarded dental practices'; also runs Luxe by Avenue Dental cosmetic brand
leads.why_pain: Fast multi-region expansion means each new practice adds phone lines, new-patient enquiry flow and recall/follow-up load; growth-stage groups typically outpace their front-desk infrastructure. (ASSUMPTION on internal phone pain - no public complaint found.)
leads.decision_maker_role: CEO / Group Operations Manager (privately owned group)
leads.contact_channel: Contact form at https://www.avenuedental.com.au/contact/; practice phone numbers listed per location
leads.outreach_angle: New-patient enquiry response and recall automation across 12 practices - one AI layer that answers after-hours calls, books into the right practice's diary, and chases unconfirmed recalls.
leads.personalization: Mention their expansion from Sunshine Coast into Brisbane, Adelaide and Melbourne and the Luxe cosmetic brand - high-value cosmetic consults are exactly where slow follow-up costs the most.

leads.location: Sunshine Coast, Brisbane, Gold Coast & Fraser Coast, QLD
leads.size_hint: 25+ practices; services span physio, podiatry, exercise physiology, dietetics, psychology, OT
leads.why_pain: 25+ clinics x ~8 service lines = heavy phone triage load (which clinician, which clinic, NDIS/Medicare/HICAPS questions); multidisciplinary bookings are error-prone for human reception at volume. (ASSUMPTION on internal pain - inferred from scale and service breadth.)
leads.evidence: https://www.sportsandspinalphysio.com.au/ ('25+ practices located on the Sunshine Coast, Brisbane, Gold Coast and Fraser Coast'); pain inference: ASSUMPTION
leads.contact_channel: Website contact/booking pages per clinic at https://www.sportsandspinalphysio.com.au/; clinic phone numbers publicly listed
leads.outreach_angle: AI intake and triage: route new enquiries to the right discipline and clinic, answer NDIS/Medicare/fund questions instantly, fill last-minute cancellation slots automatically.
leads.personalization: Name their specific footprint (Noosa to Caloundra plus Brisbane/Gold Coast/Fraser Coast) and the 8+ allied disciplines - show you understand multi-discipline triage is harder than plain physio booking.

leads.location: Melbourne, VIC - 12 clinics (Northcote, Malvern, Mornington, Craigieburn, Ringwood, Kew, Plenty Valley, etc.)
leads.industry: Aesthetic / laser skin clinics & cosmetic injectables
leads.size_hint: 12 boutique clinics, family-run for 15+ years, 'ever-expanding client list'
leads.why_pain: Family-run group at 12 sites with per-clinic phone lines and mixed ProductReview feedback; bookings arrive by phone, walk-in and web across 12 diaries - high missed-call exposure without central infrastructure. (Phone-pain specifics: ASSUMPTION.)
leads.evidence: https://www.myskinclinics.com/locations/ (12 locations); https://www.productreview.com.au/listings/myskin-laser (mixed reviews); pain inference: ASSUMPTION
leads.contact_channel: enquiries@myskinclinics.com (publicly listed business email); website contact page
leads.outreach_angle: One AI receptionist across all 12 clinics: instant response to treatment enquiries (laser packages, injectables pricing), after-hours booking, and no-show reduction via automated confirmation flows.
leads.personalization: Family-run and 15+ years old with 12 sites - pitch as 'keep the boutique feel without hiring 12 more receptionists'; reference specific suburbs like Northcote and Mornington.

leads.location: Sunnybank Hills, Brisbane + Surfers Paradise, Gold Coast, QLD
leads.size_hint: 2 multi-chair clinics, open 7 days including after hours and public holidays
leads.why_pain: Their whole positioning is emergency dentistry 7 days/after-hours - emergency demand is inherently phone-first and off-hours, and their own site notes after-hours appointments 'depend on staff availability'. Every unanswered emergency call is a lost high-value same-day patient.
leads.evidence: https://www.mgadental.com.au/emergency-dentist-brisbane/ and https://www.mgadental.com.au/emergency-dentist-gold-coast/ (7-days emergency positioning; after-hours subject to availability)
leads.contact_channel: Brisbane (07) 3273 3343, Gold Coast (07) 5539 9748; online booking and contact form on website
leads.outreach_angle: 24/7 AI emergency-line answering that triages pain cases, books same-day slots, and captures every after-hours call they currently can't staff - directly monetizes their 'open 7 days' promise.
leads.personalization: Quote their own after-hours caveat ('depending on clinician availability') and show how an AI line converts the calls that ring out at 9pm on a Sunday - their exact niche.

leads.location: HQ Byron Bay NSW; offices in Newcastle, Sydney, Wollongong, Melbourne, Brisbane, Adelaide, Hobart
leads.industry: Home services - residential solar & battery retailer/installer
leads.size_hint: 200+ staff, 8 offices, 100+ installations per week; Australia's #1 residential battery installer by volume; acquired by Rinnai Australia
leads.why_pain: Extremely high lead volume (100+ installs/week implies thousands of enquiries) with public reviews reporting communication breakdowns and 'premium, hands-off service' not delivering - lead-response and post-sale follow-up gaps at scale.
leads.decision_maker_role: Head of Sales / Chief Revenue Officer or Head of Customer Experience
leads.contact_channel: Website contact form at smartenergygroup.com.au; LinkedIn company page https://au.linkedin.com/company/smart-energy-group-pty-ltd
leads.why_note: Larger than ideal ICP but a single office/region pilot fits a $5-10k project.
leads.outreach_angle: Speed-to-lead AI: call/SMS every web lead within 60 seconds, qualify roof/bill details, book the sales consult - plus post-install AI follow-up to fix the review-visible communication gap.
leads.personalization: Cite their 100-installs-a-week volume and specific SolarQuotes review themes about chasing callbacks; frame as protecting their #1 battery-installer ranking as they scale under Rinnai.

leads.location: Sydney CBD & St Leonards NSW; Melbourne CBD & Toorak VIC
leads.size_hint: 4 clinics across 2 cities; founded 2021 with Dr Aaron Stanes - young, fast-growing brand
leads.why_pain: Single 1300 number (1300 322 346) fronts all four clinics - one queue for consults, reschedules and pricing questions across two cities; new brands grown on paid/social traffic live or die on enquiry response speed. (ASSUMPTION on response-speed pain.)
leads.evidence: https://cosmeticconnection.com.au/our-locations/ and https://cosmeticconnection.com.au/contact/ (4 locations, single 1300 line); founded 2021: https://cosmeticconnection.com.au/articles/welcome-to-cosmetic-connection/; pain inference: ASSUMPTION
leads.decision_maker_role: Founder / Dr Aaron Stanes (co-founder & medical director) or General Manager
leads.outreach_angle: AI enquiry-to-consult engine on their 1300 line and web forms: answer injectables pricing/suitability questions instantly, book consults into the right clinic, follow up no-shows.
leads.personalization: Note they scaled to 4 clinics in ~4 years since 2021 and run everything through one 1300 number - pitch AI as the way to keep 'evidence-based, doctor-led' positioning while scaling enquiry volume.

leads.location: Sydney, NSW - CBD, North Shore, Eastern Suburbs + at least 7 Western Sydney sites (Blacktown, Bankstown, Merrylands, Fairfield, Mt Druitt, Wetherill Park, Liverpool)
leads.industry: Aesthetic / laser, skin & cosmetic injections clinics
leads.size_hint: 10+ clinics across Sydney; doctors and nurses on staff
leads.why_pain: 10+ suburban clinics with individual booking via phone/Fresha/Mindbody - fragmented booking stack and per-site reception; price-sensitive laser market punishes slow quote responses. (ASSUMPTION on internal pain - inferred from footprint and third-party booking platforms.)
leads.evidence: https://www.evolutionlaser.com.au/find-a-clinic/ (multi-clinic footprint); third-party booking presence: https://www.fresha.com/lvp/evolution-laser-clinic-patrick-street-blacktown-xZ6746; pain inference: ASSUMPTION
leads.contact_channel: Website contact/booking at evolutionlaser.com.au; clinic phone numbers listed per location
leads.outreach_angle: Unify enquiry handling across 10+ clinics: AI answers 'how much is laser for X' instantly with location-specific booking, recovers abandoned online bookings, fills gaps in slow weekday sessions.
leads.personalization: Reference their Western Sydney density (Blacktown to Liverpool) - high-volume, deal-driven catchment where the fastest responder wins the package sale.

leads.location: Penrith / Western Sydney NSW; services Newcastle to Wollongong and west to Bathurst, Orange, Mudgee
leads.industry: Home services - residential solar, battery & EV charging installer
leads.size_hint: 80+ employees, in-house installation teams (no subcontractors), 390+ SolarQuotes reviews at 4.9 stars
leads.why_pain: High-intent inbound from SolarQuotes/Google at 5-star reputation levels means heavy quote-request volume; expanding service area (Newcastle-Wollongong-Central West) stretches a Penrith-based office team on lead response and site-visit scheduling. (ASSUMPTION on lead-handling strain.)
leads.evidence: https://www.solarquotes.com.au/installer-review/penrith-solar-centre/ (review volume/rating); https://www.pscenergy.com.au/ (service area, in-house team); pain inference: ASSUMPTION
leads.contact_channel: Contact form and phone at https://www.pscenergy.com.au/
leads.outreach_angle: AI quote-request concierge: instant response to every SolarQuotes/website lead, pre-qualification (bill size, roof type), automated site-visit booking - keep the 4.9-star responsiveness while volume grows.
leads.personalization: Reference founder Jake Warner's Penrith-local story and their no-subcontractor model - pitch AI as scaling their famous customer experience beyond Western Sydney without diluting it.

leads.location: Sydney, NSW - Green Valley, Bonnyrigg, Edensor Park, Strathfield
leads.industry: Dental group (general, cosmetic, implants, orthodontics, emergency)
leads.size_hint: 4 practices across south-west and inner-west Sydney
leads.why_pain: Four practices each running separate phone numbers (02 9607 4970, 02 9610 8815, 02 8080 9677...) with no unified line; emergency dentistry offering means off-hours call demand the front desks can't cover. (ASSUMPTION on missed-call volume.)
leads.evidence: https://www.gracedentalgroup.com.au/contact-us/ (4 locations, separate phone lines per clinic); pain inference: ASSUMPTION
leads.contact_channel: Contact form at https://www.gracedentalgroup.com.au/contact-us/; per-clinic phone numbers; MyHealth1st online booking
leads.outreach_angle: Single AI front door for all 4 clinics: answer every line simultaneously, book into the right location, triage emergencies after hours, and run recall follow-up campaigns.
leads.personalization: They serve multicultural south-west Sydney (Green Valley, Bonnyrigg) - highlight multilingual AI answering as a differentiator none of their local competitors have.

leads.location: National, Australia - 56+ franchise territories (75+ offices incl. NZ); offices in Melbourne, Sydney, Brisbane, Perth and regional
leads.industry: Home services - home renovation & extension builders (franchise)
leads.size_hint: Largest franchised home renovation company in Australia/NZ; founded 2007; 56 AU locations
leads.why_pain: Central 1300 787 577 line and website funnel must route high-value renovation leads (often $100k+ jobs) to the right local franchisee; franchise lead-distribution funnels are notorious for slow first response, and builders are on-site all day, not answering phones. (ASSUMPTION on response-time pain.)
leads.evidence: https://www.smithandsons.com.au/contact/ (central 1300 line + find-a-builder funnel); scale: https://choosefranchise.com/au/franchises/smith-sons-renovations-extensions-aust-pty-ltd; pain inference: ASSUMPTION
leads.decision_maker_role: Franchisor - National Marketing Manager / GM Franchise Operations
leads.outreach_angle: AI lead-qualification and routing for the national funnel: engage every enquiry in under a minute, qualify budget/scope/suburb, book the local franchisee's consult directly - a franchisee-retention benefit the franchisor can sell.
leads.personalization: Each lead is a five-to-six-figure job - show the math on one saved lead per month per territory; note their builders are on the tools and can't return calls until evening.

leads.size_hint: Small-to-mid single/multi-site practice; actively hiring front desk
leads.why_pain: Publicly advertising for a Clinic Receptionist on LinkedIn - direct signal that phones/booking load exceeds current staff; receptionist hiring (~$60k+/yr loaded cost) is exactly the spend an AI front desk offsets.
leads.evidence: https://au.linkedin.com/jobs/view/clinic-receptionist-at-sydney-health-physiotherapy-4082689412 (live receptionist job posting seen in SEEK/LinkedIn search results)
leads.contact_channel: Business contact details via their public clinic listing/website and LinkedIn company page
leads.outreach_angle: Before you hire the receptionist: AI handles the phones, online booking help and appointment reminders 24/7 for a fraction of a salary - or makes the one receptionist you hire twice as effective.
leads.personalization: Reference their live receptionist ad directly - 'saw you're hiring for front desk; here's what clinics your size automate instead' with a physio-specific demo.

leads.location: National, Australia - Melbourne VIC base with clinics in NSW (Sydney, Newcastle, Wollongong, Wagga Wagga, Narooma), QLD (Brisbane), WA (Perth)
leads.size_hint: 69 practices, 'largest network of privately-owned physiotherapy practices in Australia... and still growing'; founded 1994
leads.why_pain: 69 privately-owned practices with per-clinic reception and a stated growth agenda - inconsistent phone answering and booking experience across the network is near-certain at that scale. (ASSUMPTION - inferred from structure.)
leads.evidence: https://www.physiochoice.com.au/practices and https://www.physiochoice.com.au/company/about (69 practices, still growing); pain inference: ASSUMPTION
leads.decision_maker_role: Network CEO / Head of Operations (also per-practice principals for pilot clinics)
leads.contact_channel: Website contact/booking at physiochoice.com.au; practice phone numbers publicly listed
leads.outreach_angle: Network-wide AI reception offered as an opt-in service to practice owners: standardise answer rates and online-booking assistance across 69 clinics, piloted in 2-3 practices first.
leads.personalization: Their motto is 'we're only as good as our last visit' - extend it to 'as good as your last answered call'; propose a measurable pilot in their busiest metro clinics.

leads.size_hint: 2 CBD clinics; part of international M1 Med Beauty group (Europe-based network)
leads.why_pain: Free-consultation model generates high enquiry and consult volume with inevitable no-show leakage; two-city operation of an international brand runs lean local admin. (ASSUMPTION on no-show/enquiry pain.)
leads.evidence: https://www.m1-beauty.com.au/ (two CBD clinics, free doctor consultations); pain inference: ASSUMPTION
leads.outreach_angle: AI consult-funnel management: instant answers on pricing/procedures, automated free-consult booking, confirmation and no-show recovery sequences to protect doctor utilisation.
leads.personalization: Free consults are their acquisition engine - quantify the cost of an empty doctor slot in a CBD clinic and show recovery rates from AI confirmation/rebooking flows.

leads.why_pain: Boutique injectables brands in two cities rely on Instagram/DM and web enquiries with small admin teams - after-hours enquiry response and deposit-taking for bookings are common gaps. (ASSUMPTION - site blocked automated fetch; details from search listing only.)
leads.evidence: Search listing: 'SUEDE CLINIC - Cosmetic Injectables & Skin Clinic Sydney & Melbourne' at https://suedeclinic.com.au/ (homepage title in Google results); pain inference: ASSUMPTION
leads.contact_channel: Website contact page at suedeclinic.com.au; public Instagram business profile
leads.outreach_angle: AI DM-and-web-enquiry responder for a boutique two-city brand: answer treatment questions at 10pm when clients actually browse, take deposits, and book across both cities.
leads.personalization: Position against the big franchises: 'Laser Clinics has call centres; you can have something better for the price of a part-time admin.'
